headline: Boeing Launches Fourth 737 MAX Assembly Line to Support Higher Production (NYSE:BA)
summary: Everett Facility Begins Operating New Production LineBoeing (NYSE:BA) is set to activate a fourth final assembly line for the 737 MAX on Monday at its Everett, Washington, manufacturing site, marking another step in the company’s strategy to expand aircraft production. Known internally as the North Line, the facility forms part of Boeing’s long-term plan to increase output of its best-selling narrow-body aircraft as airlines continue to place strong orders amid sustained global demand.
